tool_args.label: Ronkonkoma Branch Switch and Signal Work (Weekends March 2025)
tool_args.raw_text: Ronkonkoma Branch – Switch and Signal Work – On the weekends of March 1-2, March 8-9, March 15-16, and March 22-23, both main tracks will be out of service between Brentwood and Ronkonkoma to support switch and signal work in the vicinity of Ronkonkoma station.

tool_args.label: Extra westbound trains for St. Patrick's Day Parade
tool_args.raw_text: the Long Island Rail Road will operate two additional westbound trains from both the Ronkonkoma and Babylon branches for customers traveling to New York City for the St. Patrick's Day parade.

payload.claim_text: The Long Island Rail Road will operate two additional westbound trains from both the Ronkonkoma and Babylon branches for customers traveling to New York City for the St. Patrick's Day parade.
payload.subject: St. Patrick's Day extra service

tool_args.label: Bus replacement between Ronkonkoma and Greenport
tool_args.raw_text: Bus service will replace train service between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, weekday/midday, to support track maintenance and crossing rehabilitations east of Ronkonkoma.

payload.claim_text: Bus service will replace train service between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, weekday/midday, to support track maintenance and crossing rehabilitations east of Ronkonkoma.
payload.subject: Ronkonkoma/Greenport Branch service adjustment

tool_args.label: Weekend service adjustment Brentwood to Ronkonkoma
tool_args.raw_text: With both main tracks out of service between Brentwood and Ronkonkoma and the single main track out of service between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, trains will terminate and originate at Deer Park on an hourly basis. Bus service will replace train service in both directions for customers traveling to/from Brentwood, Central Islip, Ronkonkoma and all stations between Ronkonkoma and Greenport. Train service will remain at half hourly intervals to/from Farmingdale station.

payload.claim_text: With both main tracks out of service between Brentwood and Ronkonkoma and the single main track out of service between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, trains will terminate and originate at Deer Park on an hourly basis. Bus service will replace train service in both directions for customers traveling to/from Brentwood, Central Islip, Ronkonkoma and all stations between Ronkonkoma and Greenport. Train service will remain at half hourly intervals to/from Farmingdale station.
payload.subject: Weekend switch and signal work service adjustments
